chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-909 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 3597/24 2.For hearing of main case 16-04-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. From perusal of prayer clause it reflects that this petition is filed for issuance of directions to constitute Super Medical Board. Super Medical Board has now been abolished in view of order dated 16.05.2006 w.e.f. 01.06.2006, by the Health Department, Government of Sindh. Therefore, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
